svg.title: FADEC software architecture diagram
svg.desc: Layered software architecture showing the PC development layer with Simulink and MATLAB, the EV3 runtime layer with deployed FADEC code, and the hardware abstraction layer interfacing with physical motors and sensors.

g.text: MATLAB R2021b+ with Simulink Home license
Deployed FADEC runs standalone at 50 Hz
Motor PWM, encoder counters, sensor I²C, LCD framebuffer
Simulink compiles MATLAB Function blocks to C → deploys to EV3 ARM9 via WiFi/USB
External mode: PC and EV3 run simultaneously for live tuning — dashed purple lines
Standalone mode: EV3 runs independently after deploy — no PC required
Solid lines = command path — Dashed lines = feedback / telemetry
